# DisableLostModeCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to take the device out of Lost Mode.

## Declaration

```swift
object DisableLostModeCommand
```

## Objects

- **DisableLostModeCommand.Command**: The command to take the device out of Lost Mode.

## Commands and responses

- **DisableLostModeResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to take the device out of Lost Mode.
